## HPAI H5N1 in Italy

updated 21/01/2026

-  51 HPAI outbreaks in poultry (commercial and  backyard)
-  24 Lombardia
-  10 Emilia - Romagna
-  10 Veneto
-  5 Piemonte
-  1 Friuli - Venezia Giulia
-  1 Toscana
-  91 HPAI positive cases in wild birds ( 161 infected subjects)
-  42 Friuli - Venezia Giulia
-  26 Lombardia
-  16 Veneto
-  7 Emilia - Romagna

## HPAI H5N1 in poultry

- The epidemic season in poultry started in week 40, matching the onset in 2024, affecting the periphery of the HDPA
- In contrast to 2024, the first cases within the core HDPA were detected about two months earlier

## HPAI H5N1 in wild birds

- The first cases detected 3 weeks later than in 2024, majority belonging to Anseriformes Order, followed by Charadriiformes , Accipitriformes and Phoenicopteriformes
- Positive cases were mainly found through active surveillance (hunted=89 and trapped=13), followed by passive surveillance (moribound or found dead=66)

## Oubreaks in poultry

-  Besides wildlife-mediated introductions, other risk factors have been identified:
-  Frequent movement of transport vehicles , especially for broiler thinning
-  Extended loading operations in large poultry farms
-  Proximity to infected premises
-  These risks highlight the importance of strict, daily biosecurity compliance , including:
-  Transport vehicle disinfection
-  Cleaning/loading area sanitation
-  Prompt reporting of mortality increases or feed intake drops , even if mild

## Disease control measures as provided by Commission Delegated Regulation (EU) 2020/687

- Epidemiological investigation
- Culling, disposal of carcasses, cleaning and disinfection procedures
- Establishment of protection and surveillance zones (3 and 10 km)
- Restrictions on movements of poultry and poultry products (with derogations)

<!-- image -->

A genetic network with Italian HPAIV sequences is depicted.

## Genetic Network - Genotype EA-2024-DI.2.1 Focus on Mantua-Verona cluster (10 Nov 2025 - 14 Jan 2026)

The largest cluster of secondary transmission events includes 22 poultry outbreaks occurring across nine different municipalities . A west-to-east pattern of spread was observed, with evidence suggesting two independent introductions from the province of Mantua to the province of Verona.

<!-- image -->

A map of the United States with various locations and their corresponding routes.

## Preventive and risk mitigation measures in place since mid-September

Ministry of Health 15 September 2025, protocol no. 26468

- Intensification of surveillance in wild bird populations
- Adoption of measures to strengthen early detection surveillance
- Implementation of measures ensuring a rapid response
- Adoption of measures to prohibit outdoor poultry farming
- Restocking/housing programme for meat turkeys
- Adoption of HPAI prevention and surveillance protocols in Wildlife Rescue and Rehabilitation Centres
- Risk-based evaluation of the possible suspension of markets, fairs, exhibitions
- Risk-based measures regulating the use of live decoy birds
- Provisions for the release and movement of game birds

<!-- image -->

## Further Restricted Zone in HDPA Veneto and Lombardia

Italian Ministry of Health, 16 October 2025  protocol no. 30074

## Main preventive/risk mitigation measures

- Census and confinement
- Enhanced biosecurity
- Movements control
- Restrictions on productive activities :
- Ban of broiler thinning
- Ban of markets, fairs, exhibitions
- Ban on release of game birds for restocking or hunting purposes
- Ban of meat turkey restocking
- Increased monitoring
- Age limits on slaughtering for meat turkey
- Pre-movement clinical inspection and virological testing
- Enhanced active surveillance for AI in wild birds
